name: @mx-loom/claude
description: mx-loom Claude Agent SDK binding. T111: the JSON Schema → Zod converter (turns each canonical `mx_*` descriptor's draft-07 `input_schema` into an equivalent Zod schema the SDK's `tool()` accepts; fail-closed; equivalence proven against the registry's Ajv seam). T110: the in-process shim — `createSdkMcpServer()` + `tool()` registration of the nine `mx_*` verbs (reusing `@mx-loom/mcp`'s router/context/serializer), the hidden `mx_await_result` poll loop, and the secret-free `canUseTool` HITL hook. Secret-free by construction; every authority decision stays out-of-process on the receiving daemon.
